## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Format passes (`ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Self-test passes (`miv self-test`)
- [ ] No secrets or prompt artifacts in changes
- [ ] Documentation updated if CLI behavior changed

Describe how you tested these changes.
